title: 11 Herbal Cream Options for Female Athletes Dealing with Amenorrhea
description: Ginkgo biloba creams for amenorrhea. Ginkgo biloba creams contain flavonoids and terpenoids, which may help with amenorrhea by increasing blood flow and reducing inflammation in the reproductive organs. This can improve hormone balance and stimulate menstrual cycles. Flavonoids, specifically quercetin, kaempferol, and isorhapontigenin, may also have anti-androgenic effects, which can help regulate hormonal imbalances.
